testimonials.quote: Bala helped us figure out what was actually slowing us down and worked with the team to fix it. Our frontend architecture is in a much better place now.
testimonials.name: Founder

testimonials.quote: He brought clarity to our technical roadmap when we really needed it. Our team ships faster and with a lot more confidence now.
testimonials.name: CTO

testimonials.quote: What I liked most is that Bala doesn't just tell you what to do — he gets in there and builds with you. Exactly what we needed at our stage.
testimonials.name: Co-founder
